subcodes.first_line: Be not gladdened by the world and whatsoever is therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: به دنیا و آنچه در اوست مسرور نباشید
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
